memories.title: Verification gate
memories.content: The verification command is the gate; rerun the exact failing check before saying a task is complete.

memories.title: Sleep-rank share pathways
memories.content: Prefer real share pathways over local fake selection when the goal is actual WeChat user transfer.

memories.title: Completed-only history
memories.content: History should show completed challenges only, and cancelled records should be deleted instead of archived.

memories.title: Engine-first session note
memories.content: The root cause was page code reaching into engine state directly; keep the engine layer independent so share and multi-user flows stay testable.

memories.title: Cloud read-back truth
memories.content: Ready auth depends on gomokuGetProfile read-back verification, not just local gomokuLogin success.

memories.title: Privacy errors must stay separate
memories.content: Keep privacy-denied, privacy-not-configured, and explicit user-cancel states separate instead of collapsing them into a generic cancellation message.

memories.title: Home render regression note
memories.content: The root cause was a render/home-view.js crash, not the toggle handler, even though the symptom looked like a stuck home switch.

memories.title: selectedTaskId session note
memories.content: The root cause was selectedTaskId being dropped across rerenders, so play.html reopened the wrong task state.

memories.title: View Outcome contract
memories.content: Update tests to the current View Outcome behavior instead of restoring stale route copy just to satisfy assertions.

memories.title: Protected completion flow
memories.content: Treat token auth, report history persistence, and blockchain ledger write-back as one completion flow and verify all of them before showing success.

memories.title: Single PROGRESS source
memories.content: Keep one PROGRESS document so auth, similarity, ledger, and workflow fixes do not drift across duplicate status notes.

memories.title: Summary sidecar isolation
memories.content: Keep SummaryUseCases and the rule_based_memory_runtime sidecar isolated so the Hybrid Memory Runtime remains easy to iterate on or remove.

memories.title: MediaPipe cleanup memory
memories.content: The MediaPipe cleanup standardized slm_cache naming and follow-up work should not reintroduce the old cache path patterns.

tasks.query: Resume the sleep-rank invite work and keep the engine boundary intact while fixing real user transfer.
Resume the gomoku auth bug and make sure privacy failure states are not confused with cloud sync failure.
Resume the play page work so selectedTaskId and View Outcome behavior stay correct without reviving stale copy.
Resume the copycatcher completion flow and make sure success waits for auth, history, and ledger write-back.
Resume the Hybrid Memory Runtime work without letting the old MediaPipe cleanup take over the local-vault direction.
